title: containers/image v5; support manifest lists; add a "manifest" command
body: Vendor in WIP branches for manifest list support to let CI exercise the changes.

comments.body:
This is a fabulous PR,  But very large.
Is a lot of this going to be vendored into podman?  Can we share all of the manafest command between podman and Buildah?

You are missing command completions.

> Is a lot of this going to be vendored into podman? Can we share all of the manifest command between podman and Buildah?

I'd envisioned podman using the new top-level "manifests" package the same way it uses the "imagebuildah" package - by wrapping the API up into a CLI that pairs it with libpod's library startup/shutdown logic, which is more involved than what buildah's CLI uses.

> You are missing command completions.

I could really use some help with that part.
Ok @TomSweeneyRedHat  can you take care of the command completions.
@rhatdan I think what you're looking for completions wise is here #1910.  Holler if not.

> @rhatdan I think what you're looking for completions wise is here #1910. Holler if not.

Looks fine to me.  I suspect we'll end up squashing everything in here before merging, and I don't want to lose your authorship information on #1910 in the process, so I'd like to continue to keep it as a second PR if that's alright.

:pushpin: Commit 0c2dd19 has been approved by `rhatdan`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
